articles.title: Hyderabad horror: Man kills six including rape victim and his own family
articles.description: A farmer allegedly murdered six people in Shabad and his village. He killed a teenage girl, her mother, and grandmother after a POCSO complaint. The accused then murdered his wife and two young sons at their home. He drove to a lake and killed the girl before returning home. Police have launched a manhunt for the absconding accused.

articles.title: Roadmap to 2030: India, New Zealand seal 18 pacts across defence, trade and security
articles.description: India and New Zealand elevated their ties to a strategic partnership.  Prime Ministers Modi and Luxon signed eighteen agreements for cooperation.  This roadmap guides future collaboration across multiple key sectors.  Bilateral trade aims to reach seven billion New Zealand dollars by 2030.  Both nations will enhance maritime security and disaster management efforts.

articles.title: Shubman Gill chats with Federer, becomes only fourth Indian captain to...
articles.description: Shubman Gill received a Royal Box invitation to Wimbledon 2026. He joined elite Indian captains previously hosted in the prestigious enclosure. Gill also met tennis legend Roger Federer and watched matches with Sachin Tendulkar. Earlier, he attended the British Grand Prix as a VIP guest. The Indian captain is currently in England for an ODI series.

articles.title: Reverse oil flow: India supplies gasoline to Russia - why it matters
articles.description: Indian refiners are well equipped from a product-quality standpoint to supply the gasoline grades required by Russia. However, Oil minister Hardeep Singh Puri has said that Indian companies are not directly selling gasoline to Russia.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: TS EAMCET 2026 Phase 1 seat allotment result released at tgeapcet.nic.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
articles.description: The Telangana Council of Higher Education has declared the TS EAMCET (TG EAPCET) 2026 Phase 1 seat allotment result, enabling candidates to check their admission status online. Those allotted seats must complete tuition fee payment and self-reporting between July 10 and July 14 to confirm admission. The allotment order can be downloaded from the official counselling portal.

Those allotted seats must complete tuition fee payment and self-reporting between July 10 and July 14 to confirm admission. The allotment order can be downloaded from the official counselling portal.

articles.title: JEECUP 2026 Round 2 seat allotment result released at jeecup.admissions.nic.in: Direct link to download scorecards
articles.description: The Joint Entrance Examination Council (Polytechnic), Uttar Pradesh has declared the JEECUP 2026 Round 2 seat allotment result on its counselling portal. Candidates can log in to check their allotted institute and course, download the allotment letter, and complete admission formalities, including fee payment, document verification, and Freeze/Float selection, within the scheduled deadlines to secure their seats.

articles.title: She cleared UPSC twice, but her dream was always IAS: Meet the doctor who chose policymaking over medicine
articles.description: Dr Ritika Aima, an MBBS graduate from Uttarakhand, cleared the UPSC Civil Services Examination twice, first securing AIR 186 to join the IPS before improving to AIR 33 and achieving her dream of becoming an IAS officer. Motivated by a desire to influence healthcare through policymaking, she chose public administration over clinical practice. Now serving in the Gujarat cadre, she encourages aspirants to stay resilient, keep a Plan B and pursue purpose-driven careers.

articles.title: Assam ITI round 4 seat allotment result 2026 out at itiassam.admissions.nic.in; direct link here
articles.description: Assam ITI Round 4 seat allotment results are now available on the official counselling website. Candidates must download their allotment letters and complete admissions by July 14, 2026. Required documents include marksheets, certificates, and photographs for verification. Round 5 results will be announced on July 15, 2026, with admissions on July 16 and 17. Failure to report on time may result in losing the allotted seat.

articles.title: Prince Harry uneasy over Meghan Markle, Kris Jenner alliance
articles.description: Meghan Markle is set to collaborate with Kris Jenner on a reality TV project, stirring unease within Prince Harry. Concerns arise for Harry as he fears this venture might hinder his attempts to restore family relationships. Meanwhile, Markle sees Jenner as a vital ally in enhancing her brand. Their contrasting attitudes towards public exposure highlight growing differences in the couple's perspectives.

articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce make FIRST appearance post-wedding - PICS
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce made a stunning appearance at JuJu Smith-Schuster's wedding, radiating joy as newlyweds. The couple, captured hand in hand, displayed their wedding bands proudly. Swift dazzled in a pink gown, while Kelce looked sharp in a classic black suit. Their attendance followed a private honeymoon, celebrating their love with close friends and well-known personalities.

articles.title: Prince Harry reveals his rarely-used full name for the podcast
articles.description: Prince Harry surprised listeners by sharing his full name on a comedy podcast. He humorously responded when asked for his complete name by the hosts. The Duke of Sussex generally avoids using his titles in public appearances. He recently attended an Invictus Games event with Meghan Markle in London. Prince Harry's podcast episode is scheduled for release on July 13, 2026.

articles.title: Dhanush's film with Vetri Maaran titled 'Thamizh Murugan'
articles.description: Actor Dhanush on Friday announced the title of his next film with ace director Vetrimaran as 'Thamizh Murugan' and released the film's first look promo as well, much to the delight of fans and film buffs.
